title: Struthanthus psilobotrys
intro: Struthanthus psilobotrys, also known as the "Struthanthus vine," is a species of hemiparasitic plant belonging to the family Loranthaceae. The Struthanthus vine has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory infections, and inflammatory diseases, due to its reported anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Struthanthus psilobotrys include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Struthanthus psilobotrys is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to make remedies for colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
